event_name: Brandywine Falls Sass Peepre Memorial Event
event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1978-1982) merged duplicate event 27772027-7488-579b-8a88-559d0493c6ba ("Brandywine Falls Meet"). Reason: schedule duplicate. Notes: The memorial-event wording is the fuller name for the same Aug. 9, 1981 Brandywine Falls event.
